substitutions.label: role-play
substitutions.rule: Never replace an oral activity with a written one. Preserve the competency.

substitutions.label: long writing
substitutions.rule: Always keep some writing. Shorten, don't eliminate. EO-10 (audio recording) is a supplementary option when written alternatives are not feasible; it must not be the sole replacement for all writing in the lesson.

substitutions.label: mechanical grammar
substitutions.rule: Change format, don't eliminate grammar practice.
